ham.subject: Transaction Alert – Immediate Attention Required
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We are writing to inform you of a recent transaction on your account at Acme Bank:

Transaction ID: 987654321
Date & Time: 2026-04-15 14:32:07 UTC
Amount: $1,234.56
Merchant: Acme Electronics

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required.

If you do NOT recognize this transaction, please click the secure link below to verify or dispute the charge:

<URL>

For your safety, do not reply to this email. If you need assistance, contact our 24‑hour support line at 1‑800‑123‑4567.

Thank you for banking with Acme Bank.

Sincerely,
Acme Bank Security Team

spam.subject: Action Required: IT Helpdesk Ticket #123456 Pending
spam.body:
Hi Team,

This is an automated notification from the IT Helpdesk. Your support ticket #123456 is currently in the "Awaiting User Input" stage. To progress the ticket, please verify your account details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Please confirm your username and password by the end of this week or the ticket will be escalated and potentially closed. Failure to comply may result in service disruption.

If you have already completed this step, please ignore this message. Otherwise, act immediately to avoid any inconvenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Automation
